pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take: **Devin, you had the audacity to draft Bosnia, and now you're tiptoeing through fantasy soccer with the grace of a giraffe on roller skates.** Spain might be carrying you with their silky skills and historical prowess, but when you put them up against Gunner's France in a head-to-head, let me tell you something, "Ghost Pepper" — it's a massacre waiting to happen. Norway’s recent form is as unimpressive as your choice in Tier 3 countries, making your chances resemble that of a snowball surviving a Texas summer. Meanwhile, "Bubba G" is banking on France's depth and talent to steamroll Norway, and rightly so, because, let's face it, Zach, you're stuck in fourth for a reason — you couldn't pick an upset if it hit you in the face. My prediction? France will hand Norway a lesson in football that'll send Devin scrambling back to the drawing board faster than you can say "advancement points." And Rafe, if you think you're riding high in second, remember this: chaos isn't a strategy, but somehow it might just work against this bunch of amateurs. Mic drop, baby.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper's Spain Poised to Ignite Uruguay in Zapopan
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin's strategy: rely on a team that has actually qualified.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Hopes Saudi Arabia Won't Condiment Cape Verde
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach confident his T4 pick can outperform expectations this time.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G Counting on French Revolution Against Norway
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner prays his Tier 1 draft was worth the hype.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin's Tactical Genius Elevates Him to Third Place
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's Ivory Coast and Turkey deliver in tight schedule.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe's chaos is cracking the top ranks — kid's living rent-free in Gayden's head.
Rafe's Tier-1 disaster is a masterpiece of randomness; Nigeria, Poland, Jamaica? Pure comedy.
Rafe sat Devin down TWICE; Ghost Pepper? More like Ghost Busted.
Sim slapped by Rafe — 14% win chance, yet he's cruising past seasoned pros.
